citations.narrative:
During inspection, the contingency plan did not have documentation of the annual review and the last two semi-annual
facility inspections did not include the annual review of the contingency plan. The contingency plan must be reviewed by
the research facility on at least an annual basis to ensure that it adequately addresses the criteria listed in paragraph (l)(1)
and maintain annual review documentation. Contingency plans, as well as all annual review documentation, must be
made available to APHIS upon request.
Correct by 25 April, 2026
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with the Attending Veterinarian.
n

narrative:
2.38(l)(2) 
   
Miscellaneous. 
During inspection, the contingency plan did not have documentation of the annual review and the last two semi-annual 
facility inspections did not include the annual review of the contingency plan. The contingency plan must be reviewed by 
the research facility on at least an annual basis to ensure that it adequately addresses the criteria listed in paragraph (l)(1) 
and maintain annual review documentation. Contingency plans, as well as all annual review documentation, must be 
made available to APHIS upon request. 
 
Correct by 25 April, 2026 
 
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with the Attending Veterinarian.
